name: sportiq-mcp
description: 44 AI sports tools for FIFA World Cup 2026 football, Formula 1, and IPL cricket.
long_description: SportIQ turns any MCP-compatible AI into a sports-analytics engine. Ask in plain English to simulate the World Cup 2026 bracket (Monte Carlo + Poisson xG), model F1 pit strategy from live tyre-degradation data, build an optimal fantasy XI with an ILP solver, and compare model probabilities against market-implied odds across football, F1, and cricket. Launches via `uvx`, so it requires the `uv` toolchain (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) on the host.

tools.name: football_simulate_bracket
tools.description: Monte Carlo World Cup 2026 bracket simulation with a Poisson xG engine.

tools.name: f1_predict_pit_strategy
tools.description: Tyre-degradation pit-strategy model on live OpenF1 telemetry.

tools.name: cricket_build_dream11_team
tools.description: PuLP ILP solver for an optimal fantasy XI under all constraints.

tools.name: football_find_value_bets
tools.description: Surface the largest gaps between model and market-implied probabilities.
